items.title: [负面] 游戏还行，但服务器垃圾的要死，我过个剧情能给我卡到飞起，一个回合重连7次，还有4次卡回登录界面，平均...
items.summary: 游戏还行，但服务器垃圾的要死，我过个剧情能给我卡到飞起，一个回合重连7次，还有4次卡回登录界面，平均每几局都要重连一次，运气不好打个四回合boss能给你重连好几次，真的是让人红温，这还只是过剧情，我都不敢想象pvp有多卡，真的无敌了。

items.title: [正面] Goated card game battler. Highly recommend, especi...
items.summary:
Goated card game battler. Highly recommend, especially if you like things like Slay the Spire, Inscryption, I Was a Teenage Exocolonist; as well as Lovecraftian horror, dark themes, Dark Academia aesthetics, and cool art. Each character has amazing concept art and interesting mechanics/playstyle. With many characters and equippable items, Morimens has high replayability.

Awesome for free-to-play (f2p) players since it never feels in-your-face about making in-game purchases. And purchasing in-game still doesn't guarantee characters, wheels, and other items; so, anyone can have similar builds and you could believe they did everything without spending a dime. That said, there is incentive to spending money in the game, in the form of gaining exp quicker that you couldn't get otherwise (though you get exp with playing anyway, so it's just a boost and nothing game-breaking).

There isn't really a multiplayer. You can follow people and showcase your characters; others can use your showcased character in their own expeditions. And you yourself can use their showcased characters in yours. 

The English translation has gotten a lot better since I started playing in February, 2025, and the developers are pouring their care into the updates. It is definitely worth checking out.

items.title: [正面] Slay the Spire Lovecraftian themed gacha game.  If...
items.summary:
Slay the Spire Lovecraftian themed gacha game.  If you like or can tolerate all three, this game may be for you.  If you don't like how StS plays, how Lovecraft creeps things out, or how gachas want your money?  Stay away.

Me, I like or can live with all three, so I recommend it on that basis.

items.title: [正面] Pretty fun card game with a good roster of waifus ...
items.summary: Pretty fun card game with a good roster of waifus for different taste, although they are lacking in any cool guys that fit my style.

items.title: [负面] I used to have a pretty positive review up but, ho...
items.summary:
I used to have a pretty positive review up but, honestly, I'm tired. It's death by a thousand annoyances for me. First it was Divine Realm Aequor. I truly dislike those mechanics but that seems to be the direction they'll take every single Aequor awakener from now on. Over time, I grew to like Aequor (Aurita is to blame for that) and the Divine Realm killed all the fun for me.

Then there are a multitude of small things that are just plain irritating. Awakeners are now receiving "Axiom" buffs, which means if you have the maximum amount of copies of each of them they'll be, arguably, stronger and that's just stacking p2w on top of p2w. The turn rewind feature a lot of people asked for was implemented but it's locked behind the premium monthly pass. Many buff requests to older and beloved awakeners are just plain ignored, like Aurita, 24, Wanda or poor Doresain, who had a LOT of hype on him but was very underwhelming since release.

On top of that, B.I.A.V. insists on creating "one character solutions" to gameplay hindrances they create, with Vortice being the latest example of that trend. And the straw that broke the camel's back for me is Saya no Uta. Why? Just why? I'm not even gonna argue about it, those who know, know, those who don't are better off that way.

I have zero faith left in the game, I disagree with the direcion it's going in and, since there's nothing I can really do about it, let this be an elegy for my time wih it. I'll probably be going f2p for a bit, maybe I'll stick around out of sunk cost fallacy and a misguided sense of commitment, maybe I won't. Time will tell.

items.title: [正面] Beautiful art, decent enough story, slay the spire...
items.summary: Beautiful art, decent enough story, slay the spire esque gameplay. Fun.
